content.text:
Context: This summary will be shown in a list to help users and Claude choose which conversations are relevant.

Please write a concise, factual summary that synthesizes these part-summaries into one cohesive paragraph. Focus on what was accomplished and any notable technical decisions or challenges. Output in <summary></summary> tags. Claude will see this summary when searching previous conversations for useful memories and information.

Part summaries:
1. 사용자가 현재 단일 레이아웃의 TrmWordDict 앱을 샘플 HTML 스타일의 완전히 재설계된 구조로 전환 요청. 관리자/사용자 역할 분리, 별도 레이아웃, URL 구조 재정의(/app/*, /admin/*), 17개 신규 파일 생성 및 10개 제거. Option A(Big Bang) 방식으로 한 번에 전체 전환하기로 결정. 설계 완료 후 구현 계획 단계로 진행.
2. Completed major frontend redesign separating USER and ADMIN screens across `/app/*` and `/admin/*` routes with new layouts, sidebars, and role-based routing guards. Implemented 14 pages including searchable word/domain list views, real-time forbidden word scanner, and admin dashboard with data management, MCP integration, statistics, and settings tabs. Fixed old file cleanup issue and verified build success.
3. Created a comprehensive implementation plan for redesigning the general user interface, covering 7 tasks: adding CSS variables for status indicators, rebuilding the AppHomePage with hero section and category sidebar, integrating AG Grid for table view, refactoring routing, enhancing WordDetailPage with summary and reference cards, strengthening ForbiddenPage with metrics and policy tables, and final build validation with documentation updates.

Good:
<summary>Built conversation search system with JavaScript, sqlite-vec, and local embeddings. Implemented hierarchical summarization for long conversations. System archives conversations permanently and provides semantic search via CLI.</summary>

Bad:
<summary>This conversation synthesizes several topics discussed across multiple parts...</summary>

Your summary (max 200 words):

<summary>
Redesigned TrmWordDict application from single-layout to dual-role architecture with separate User (/app/*) and Admin (/admin/*) routes. Implemented 14+ pages including searchable word/domain list views, real-time forbidden word scanner, admin dashboard with data management and statistics, role-based routing guards, and new layouts/sidebars. Major implementation involved creating 17 new files, removing 10 obsolete ones, and switching to "Big Bang" full-system migration approach. Completed frontend implementation with MCP integration and verified successful build. Subsequent UI refinement phase addressed CSS variables for status indicators, hero section redesign, AG Grid table integration, forbidden page enhancements with metrics, and comprehensive documentation updates.
</summary>
